info.name: Kachō VPC — SEQ
info.description: Quota-aware sub-suite (seq). Uses existingFolderId / existingFolderCrossId from env; preflight creates shared net/subnet/sg/rt/gw inside FOLDER.

exec: // existingFolderId is mandatory in this suite — skip setup-org/cloud/folder.
